## Description

A clear description of what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Content update
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No em dashes in new copy

## Screenshots

If the change is visual, add before/after screenshots.
